description:
EIM GUI: Cross-Platform ESP-IDF Installation Manager


What's Changed
- IEP-1711: Disable DMA-BUF renderer Nvidia issue by @alirana01 in #524
- EIM-578: Testing workflow by @alirana01 in #527
- Updated faq.md by @Hahihula in #529
- add linux support in homebrew ci (EIM-586) by @jiesou in #537
- release commit v0.8.5 by @Hahihula in #520
- EIM-581: fix for non utf8 character in python venv path by @Hahihula in #540
- EIM-589 fixed get git path by @Hahihula in #538
- fix rpm package python dependency by @Hahihula in #530
- Added oldstable versions to gui version selector by @Hahihula in #526
- fixed build pipeline by @Hahihula in #549
- EIM-34: Add retry logic to files download by @Hahihula in #548
- [TEST] update CI trigger for offline test workflow by @Fabricio-ESP in #521
- EIM-580: the eim install comand now does not run if the idf is already installed by @Hahihula in #531
- [TEST] Update test docs and code comments by @Fabricio-ESP in #546
- EIM-600: Offline archives symlinks and extraction respecting original archive file params by @alirana01 in #556
- atempt to fix serialisation of data sed to telemetry by @Hahihula in #554
New Contributors
- @jiesou made their first contribution in #537
